name: Memorall
description: Memorall - AI-powered memory and knowledge management browser extension
author: Zergling

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; worker-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; frame-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https: data: blob:;
content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' blob: data: chrome-extension:; worker-src 'self' blob:; child-src 'self' blob: data: chrome-extension:; frame-src 'self' blob: data: chrome-extension:; img-src * data: blob: chrome-extension:; media-src * data: blob: chrome-extension:; style-src * 'unsafe-inline'; font-src * data:; object-src 'self';
